title: I Went to The Healthiest Restaurant in California

chunks.title: Introduction to the Meet and Greet
chunks.summary: The video begins with a welcome message from the host, who is at a Lineage Xallow Organics meet and greet in Venice, California. It emphasizes the significance of animal-based diets and improved food quality in the context of a restaurant event.
chunks.transcript: What's up, guys? In this video, I'm going to take you with me on a day in the life. We are at a Lineage Xallow Organics meet and greet here in Venice, California. It is a lineage takeover today at [music] Tallow Grill. Everything is cooked in Lineage Tallow. We've got a line of like hundreds [music] of people waiting to come and say hi to me and Brendan from Santa Cruz Medicinals. So many good stories today, success stories, people changing their life with improved intentional eating, animal-based diets, more meat, higher quality foods. And I'm going to show you guys the kitchen here. I love that restaurants like this are happening. They're coming to the forefront. They're improving food quality. What they do here is incredible. It's grass-fed beef. Lineage grass-fed beef tallow today. They always cook all their fries [music] and tallow. They use wood cutting boards. They use stainless steel. They're trying to minimize plastic at every turn. They're doing an incredible job here. This example, I think, should be replicated by other restaurants. [music] So, I really want to support them and I want to show you guys how it can be done well. When you go to restaurants, you should be asking them what they're cooking foods in. And if they're cooking foods and you pull the lineage towel out of your pocket and you hand them lineage towel [music] and you say, "Please cook in this. Please do not cook in seed oils." And the more that happens here in Los Angeles, in Miami, in other places, the better these restaurants are going to get. I did it in a restaurant in Washington DC when I was there for the recent Maha thing. They cooked everything in lineage tallow. All right, guys. So, come with me today for this meet and greet. Like I said, I'm going to take you in the kitchen. We're going to show you how it is. I'm going to meet a lot of amazing people, and you're going to hear some

chunks.title: Quality of Ingredients and Cooking Methods
chunks.summary: The host discusses the high-quality ingredients used at the Tallow Grill, including grass-fed beef and the practice of minimizing plastic waste. There's also a personal anecdote about changing dining practices to avoid seed oils and support healthier cooking methods.

chunks.title: Tallow vs Seed Oils in Cooking
chunks.summary: During a kitchen tour, the host and staff explain the benefits of cooking with tallow compared to seed oils. They highlight the stability of tallow and the drawbacks of commonly used vegetable oils, particularly when heated.
chunks.transcript: that's a solid. So that's the reason it's so stable because there's much more saturated fat in tallow. It doesn't degrade nearly as quickly as the seed oils do. I mean, when you cook something in seed oils, especially when you heat a seed oil, man, that oil is destroyed so quickly. Tallow is much more stable, but it looks like a solid fat. That is brick. 100%. And in the marinades, when they're marinating all their steaks and stuff, they just, it doesn't matter the quality of their beef, they just load a bunch of canola oil in there because it's a liquid oil, so it can sit in the marinade bag. chunks.title: Challenges in Maintaining Quality Standards
chunks.summary: The video addresses the obstacles the restaurant faces regarding supply chains and regulatory requirements, particularly when ensuring quality and safety in food service. The hosts express the challenges of maintaining high standards in a traditional restaurant environment.

chunks.title: Final Thoughts on Sustainable Dining
chunks.summary: Concluding the video, the hosts share their hopes for the future of the restaurant industry, emphasizing the importance of making intentional choices for improved health and sustainability. They encourage viewers to support businesses that prioritize quality ingredients and eco-friendly practices.
